Interview Hub

Assessments

Choose your assessment format. Each simulation mirrors real-world interview conditions to prepare you optimally.

Medium90 min

Online Assessment

Replicate real OA conditions

Simulate the timed online assessments used by top tech companies. Solve algorithmic problems under time pressure — just like the real thing.

Timed coding challenges
Auto-graded test cases
No hints allowed
AI analysis after submission

📞
Medium45 min

Phone Interview

Sharpen your verbal explanation

Practice the classic technical phone screen format — one problem, real-time code, think out loud while the AI plays a senior engineer screening you.

Single focused problem
AI interviewer responses
Verbal walkthrough practice
Edge case probing
ArrayStringHash TableTree
🏢
Hard3–4 hrs

Onsite Simulation

Full interview loop experience

Go through a complete multi-round onsite simulation. Coding rounds + system design concepts + behavioral questions — the whole package.

Multiple coding rounds
System design questions
Behavioral round
Comprehensive AI report
All topicsSystem DesignOOPConcurrency

What to Expect

💻

Online Assessment

1

Algorithm coding (2–3 problems)

2

Automated judge

3

Time limit enforced

📞

Phone Interview

1

1 coding problem

2

Think-aloud required

3

Behavioral follow-ups

🏢

Onsite Simulation

1

4 rounds: 2 coding, 1 system design, 1 behavioral

2

Round-by-round feedback

3

Hire/No-hire decision score

🎯 OA Strategy

  • → Read all problems first, start with the easiest
  • → Don't get stuck — a partial solution is better than none
  • → Handle edge cases: empty array, null, duplicates
  • → Test with the given examples before submitting

📞 Phone Screen Tips

  • → Always clarify requirements before writing any code
  • → Narrate your thinking process continuously
  • → Start with brute force, then optimize step by step
  • → Ask about time/space complexity expectations

🏢 Onsite Survival Guide

⏰

Time Management

Spend no more than 35 min per coding problem

🗣️

Communicate

Talk through every decision, even tradeoffs

🧪

Test Your Code

Walk through examples manually after writing

😌

Stay Calm

Interviewers want to see how you handle pressure
